title: organization-diagnosis common definitions v0.1
description: Shared $defs for organization-diagnosis register schemas. ID immutability, cross-register reference integrity, and ID reuse prohibition are validator responsibilities and are not fully expressible in JSON Schema alone.

schemaVersion.description: Data contract version for organization-diagnosis v0.1 register files.

registerType.description: Register file kind for the common envelope.

caseId.description: Internal case identifier without customer or personal names.

extensions.description: Future extension fields. Only this object may carry undocumented keys.

registerEnvelope.description: Abstract base envelope for register JSON files. Concrete register schemas compose with allOf at the root, specialize register_type and items, and set unevaluatedProperties:false at the root (same level as allOf, not inside an allOf branch).

items.description: Register entries. Item shape is defined by each register schema.

evidenceId.description: Evidence identifier. Date segment is the MTG session extraction date. Immutable after issuance.

occurrenceKeyId.description: Occurrence key for event-level grouping. Date segment is event date when known, otherwise UNKNOWN. Immutable after issuance; do not rename when occurrence_date is later determined.

patternId.description: Pattern identifier. Immutable after issuance; do not reuse.

hypothesisId.description: Hypothesis identifier. Immutable after issuance; do not reuse.

causalEdgeId.description: Causal edge identifier. Immutable after issuance; do not reuse.

causalLoopId.description: Causal loop identifier. Immutable after issuance; do not reuse.

verificationActionId.description: Verification action identifier. Immutable after issuance; do not reuse.

mtgSessionId.description: MTG session identifier. Also serves as the input snapshot identifier. Date segment is MTG session date. Immutable after issuance.

sensitivity.description: Confidentiality level. exclude_from_org_diagnosis is an out-of-order forced exclusion, not the top of the normal sensitivity order.

sourceForm.description: Physical form of the source material. Shared by Evidence items and input snapshot input_files.
